summary:
Wiki lint complete. Here's what was fixed:

**Fixed:**
- Added missing `## Overview` sections to `sources/meta.md` and `sources/microsoft.md` (the only two source pages lacking them)
- Updated `last_updated` to 2026-05-13 on both modified source pages
- Updated `index.md` last updated date to 2026-05-13

**Verified (no fixes needed):**
- **Structural integrity:** All 181 content pages listed in `index.md` exist on disk. Zero orphan pages. Zero broken wikilinks in rendered content. No companies or people in `entities/`.
- **Wrong/duplicate info:** No duplicate pages. No duplicate paragraphs. No factually inconsistent dates. All 107 entities have consistent `type:` fields. No stale claims requiring updates.
- **Connection quality:** All pages have substantive `## Connections` sections with annotated wikilinks. No bare "Related:" or "See also:" links remain. All 6 topic pages have `## Evolution` and `## Patterns & Insights` sections. All 7 new untracked pages are properly linked and indexed.

**Counts:** 6 topics + 25 sources + 3 timelines + 107 entities + 40 ideas = 181 content pages.

Lint entry appended to `wiki/log.md`.
